sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Apple Stock Closes Above $240 After 36-Day Gap -Jim Cramer Mocks Early Sellers: '… Who Told Us It Was Over?' - Apple  ( NASDAQ:AAPL )
feed.summary: Apple Inc. AAPL closed at $241.53 on Thursday, marking its first close above $240 in 36 days. This prompted Jim Cramer, the host of "Mad Money," to take a jab at early sellers who doubted the stock's resilience.
